title: Spectral Arrow Recipe Substitute
description: Glow Berries can be used as a substitute for Glowstone Dust to make Spectral Arrows.
body:
Adds a crafting recipe to use Glow Berries instead of Glowstone Dust to craft Spectral Arrows.

![Crafting recipe demonstration for using Glow Berries as a substitute for Glowstone Dust to craft a Spectral Arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HOS81BKR/images/275c0f7f44dda43f6b1bd85de43668829fcdee53.png)

In order to maintain balance with Vanilla, using Glow Berries to substitute Glowstone Dust has the downside of just giving 1 Arrow, instead of 2.

This crafting recipe merges in a group with the existing Spectral Arrow recipe, so it does not take up extra space in the Recipe Book.
